title: Facebook Merge Email
content:
Facebook Merge Email

I have requested a name change from 'Etceter4' to 'ET4L' in order to make my two pages (of those same names) eligible for merging. According to Facebook regulation, I need the names to be more similar. Both pages are owned by me, Anthony Padavano, and both of their purposes are similar: they are to promote and sell art. However, ET4L is the parent company in which Etceter4 will do its business. I would like for 'Etceter4' to be merged with my 'ET4L' page, with 'ET4L' being the page that remains. This would allow me to retain the likes I was able to attain through the 'Etceter4' page with paid Facebook advertising, but keep the name and posts associated with ET4L.

Thank you for your consideration,
Anthony Padavano
